findings: Launcher supports explicit model rotation via --models, with per-pane assignment and dry-run preview (bin/stampede.sh:545-574, 603-606, 850-854, 866-868).
Premium model policy exists as metadata/prompt guidance but launcher only sets --model for commander pane; child enforcement depends on commander behavior (bin/stampede.sh:739-757, 793-811, 942-956).
Default model mismatch: skill defaults to Sonnet but launcher default is claude-haiku-4.5, risking silent downgrade if script run directly (skills/SKILL.md:39-40, 104-111; bin/stampede.sh:15).
Preflight validates only first model in rotation and Copilot CLI fallback to gh copilot may be silent, risking runtime failures (bin/stampede.sh:202-203, 226-240, 112-125).
